Group and root declaration rules: sentinel carriers, single ownership per
node, one root, flags-only inheritance, and chain-unique names.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

//fabrik:cli:group name=jobs
var _jobs struct{}

//fabrik:cli:group name=jobs
var _jobsAgain struct{}

//fabrik:cli:root
var _root struct{}

//fabrik:cli:root
var _rootAgain struct{}

//fabrik:cli:group name=exported
var Exported struct{}

//fabrik:cli:group name=nounderscore
var nounderscore struct{}

//fabrik:cli:group name=initialized
var _initialized = struct{}{}




-- want/diags --
error: shared/shared.go:6:1: duplicate //fabrik:cli:group for "jobs"
  help: first declared at $WORK/shared/shared.go:3:1
error: shared/shared.go:12:1: duplicate //fabrik:cli:root
  help: first declared at $WORK/shared/shared.go:9:1; an application has one root
error: shared/shared.go:15:1: //fabrik:cli:group must be on an unexported sentinel variable
  help: declare it as: var _name struct{}
error: shared/shared.go:18:1: //fabrik:cli:group must be on an unexported sentinel variable
  help: declare it as: var _name struct{}
error: shared/shared.go:21:1: //fabrik:cli:group must be on an unexported sentinel variable
  help: declare it as: var _name struct{}
